title: Personalized Gifts from Pinhole Press!
excerpt: When looking for gifts for people who are difficult to shop for, my usual go-to is something personalized. Photo gifts are some of my favorites, and Pinhole Press makes it super easy. I've collaborated with them to bring you three…
body:
When looking for gifts for people who are difficult to shop for, my usual go-to is something personalized. Photo gifts are some of my favorites, and Pinhole Press makes it super easy. I've collaborated with them to bring you three projects that I created mainly using photos of Jack. And there's a discount code you won't want to miss out on too. I made a wall calendar for his grandma, a Mini Book for Jack, and magnets for stocking stuffers for everyone. Even though the calendar is stunning on it's own (the paper is amazing), I couldn't resist embellishing, stamping, and using watercolors on some of the months.

I got so excited about the magnets that I let Jack play around with them in his playroom. We stuck them on the book cart as well as his toy cart.

I'll be giving Jack his book of names and faces at Christmas, so I will try and take photos of him flipping through that then.

The best part is that you can still receive these in time for Christmas and receive 15% off all products at Pinhole Press with code: tangerine15 through Tuesday, 12/15. For Christmas delivery, order photo books by Monday and all other products by Tuesday!
